meaning: n.澧炵⒊浣滅敤,鍖栨补浣滅敤
examples: But most of the really detailed hard parts like carburetion, power transmission, fuel injection etc, are already solved and come in ready-made components.
The complex carburant developed by this Company has the advantages including high fixed carbon content, low S and P content, stable carburetion effect and high acquirement rate.
